steps.title: Identify the passage's main focus
steps.content: The passage introduces the silversword alliance, describes its members' wide range of forms, explains that all members descended from a single ancestral tarweed, and shows how they diversified through adaptation to different habitats. The core purpose is explaining a plant family's diversity.

steps.title: Match the passage's purpose to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice C (‘To describe the silversword alliance and explain how the plant family became so varied’) is correct. It states the passage describes the silversword alliance and explains how the plant family became so varied—exactly what the passage does.

The passage introduces the alliance, describes its phenotypic range, explains a single ancestor origin, and shows how adaptation produced its diversity.

The other choices either overreach the passage's scope or misstate its content.

That confirms C is correct.
